name: Pasta w/ Smoked Mozzarella, Asparagas & Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dried tomatoes, sliced into strips
3/4 lb Asparagus, cut diagonally into 1-inch pieces
1 tbsp Fresh thyme leaves (or 1 tsp Dried thyme)
1/4 lb Smoked mozzarella, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak dried tomato strips in the cup of warm water for 3-5 minutes until they begin to soften. Drain and reserve the liquid.
2. Heat 5 inches of water to boiling in a large saucepot. Add the asparagus and cook for 3 minutes until tender but still crisp. Remove to a bowl and set aside.
3. In the same pot of boiling water, cook the pasta. While it's cooking:
- Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat; add onion and saute for 5 minutes.
- Reduce heat to low; add garlic and saute for 3 minutes.
- Stir in tomato liquid, asparagus, thyme leaves, and salt. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Drain pasta; return it to the pot and toss with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil.
5. Place on serving platter and top with tomato-asparagus mixture and mozzarella. Serve immediately, or to serve cold, cool to room temperature, cover and refrigerate.
